deconstruction.context: Migrated from local git to Supabase. Testing telegram HTTP bots.

lateral_prism.tech_view: Asyncio/HTTPX issues on Windows need resolution before bot reliability is assured. Supabase REST API must handle the payload seamlessly.
lateral_prism.biz_view: Daily briefing and push notifications are critical for the user's routine compliance.
lateral_prism.risk_view: Supabase free-tier exhaustion from bot loops; Windows EventLoop crashes; RLS misconfiguration.

plan: Run asyncio test scripts to verify bot connectivity.
